title: Principal Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto Global Group in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto Global Group:
Bajaj Auto Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto Global Group!
